title: Increasing the number of items on the board in the PRO plan
excerpt: Monday DB2.0 improved the array item limit for Enterpise accounts by a factor of five. Unfortunately, PRO accounts have been omitted from this monday update. This is sad. The amount of 10,000 items for an organization wi…

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday DB2.0 improved the array item limit for Enterpise accounts by a factor of five. Unfortunately, PRO accounts have been omitted from this monday update. This is sad. The amount of 10,000 items for an organization with a PRO account is definitely too small. When creating tasks and wanting to have an overview of year-round cyclical tasks in a team of only 10 people, we can easily reach this limit within a few months. Jumping between boards is a nightmare. I think mondaya’s infrastructure allows us to extend and streamline the PRO plans. We don’t need the Enterpise plan because we are too small for such a tall plan, we just need more items on the board.
